name: Garam Masala
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 275°F. Combine spices on a pizza pan or cookie sheet; bake for about 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Place roasted spices in a blender container and cover. Blend until a fine powder forms. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Makes about 1/4 cup.
Note: To make Homemade Garam Masala from ground spices, mix 1 tablespoon ground coriander, 2 teaspoons black pepper, 2 teaspoons ground cardamom, 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon, and 1 teaspoon ground cloves. Makes about 1/4 cup.
